www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 13 --

2 | Issue No. 1
By Russell Brunson, the Overnight Success Maker
For almost 10 years now, the
one complaint or question I
consistently hear from successful marketers is this: “I can
convert traffic from my list and from my partners lists, but
I can’t convert
cold traffic.” Yes,
cold traffic is the holy grail
of internet marketing.
So, how do you get people who don’t have an existing
relationship with you or your partners to come to your
website and decide to give you money? Until you can figure
that out, you don’t actually have a real business.
There are a few things you need to understand
before
you can convert cold traffic, and then a few simple things
you can do to your signup process that will make it work
for you. I discuss some of this in the DotComSecrets book
on page 118 where I talk about traffic temperature. I’d
recommend re-reading that section to get even better
understanding of this concept.
Step 1: Determine Where You Are Meeting
Your Prospects
To understand how to convert cold traffic, you have to first
understand where on the product awareness continuum
they are coming to you from. This quote from Gene
Schwartz helped me to really understand this concept well:
“If your prospect is aware of your product and realizes it can
satisfy his desire, your headline starts with your product. If
he is not aware of your product, but only of the desire itself,
your headline starts with the desire. If he is not yet aware of
what he really seeks, but is concerned only with the general
problem, your headline starts with that problem and
crystallizes it into a specific need.”
Understanding this is the first step to figuring out why
you aren’t currently converting cold traffic. Most likely
your sales messages (videos, landing pages, webinars,
etc...) are very product or solution focused. This is how
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 13 --

DotComSecrets Labs | 3
bridgePAGE
you have to craft offers to convert to your own (hot) traffic
or your partners (warm) traffic. But this approach actually
repels cold traffic, because they have
no idea what you’re
talking about. We have to talk to the cold / mass markets
differently. We have to change our vocabulary and how we
talk about our offers.
My test to know if I’m speaking to people who are unaware
of the problem (the masses) is to ask this question: If I were
to walk into a food court at the mall, and make my offer to
everyone, would the majority of the people there have any
idea what I was talking about?
For example, if I was at the food court and yelled out, “Who
wants to learn how to get more traffic to your website!?!”
The majority of people in the food court would have
no idea
what I was talking about.
But, if I yelled out, “Who wants a
free money making
website!?!” the majority of people would listen up. So the
first step is broadening your message for the masses. You
also need to change your vocabulary. Instead of using terms
like “traffic” that the industry would use, I would change my
language patterns to say things like “get people to go to
your website” so the masses could understand.
Step 2: Take Them To A Simple Landing Page
(Mini Survey Style Is My Favorite)
I’ll probably do a whole issue in the future on mini-survey
style squeeze pages and all of the awesome things we’ve
learned about them (and you can see a
lot of related tests
in the DotComSecrets Labs book) – but for now I will just
tell you that I
love sending cold traffic to this type of page.
I learned this style from Daegan Smith, and give him 100
percent credit for discovering it. Here is an example of a
mini-survey page that we used for years for one of our
“business opportunity” offers:
Notice this message would completely resonate with
everyone at the food court. The mini survey is very non-
threatening and in almost every market we’ve done them
Mini Survey (DCS-X Funnel Step 1)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 13 --

4 | Issue No. 1
in, have had amazing conversions.
We just created a mini-survey (above) for one of our Ignite
students in the piano niche and he more than doubled his
conversions!
Now, one thing I want to note, is that I’m not actually
selling the free website. That’s not my core offer. In the
first example, I was selling access to my membership site
called “DotComSecretsX” where I was teaching people how
to drive traffic and build lists (both
very industry specific
terms that make
no sense to the food court masses). So I
had to find something on the front end that they would
understand (free website).
The free website is simply an affiliate offer I’m part of. After
they optin, I email them the link to the free website... but
then I take them to what I call a “bridge” page.
Step 3: The Bridge Page – Connecting Cold
Traffic To Your Hot Offer
The “Bridge Page” is a page between the mini-survey
squeeze page and the offer page. When they go to the
offer page, I will be using industry terms to try to sell them
my product – so I need to educated them, and
warm them
up so they are prepared for the offer they will see on the
next page. You can see an example of what one of my
bridge pages look like on page five.
Mini Survey Style Landing Page
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 13 --

DotComSecrets Labs | 5
bridgePAGE
Bridge Page (DCS-X Funnel Step 2)
The purpose of the bridge page is to meet people where
they are at, and then get them to where they need to be
to buy. My first goal is to give them what I promised on the
initial page. My second goal is to “bridge” the gap between
what I just gave them, and what I’m trying to sell them.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 13 --

6 | Issue No. 1
Full DCS-X “Bridge Page” Funnel:
Sales Page (DCS-X Funnel Step 3)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 13 --

DotComSecrets Labs | 7
bridgePAGE
The purpose of the bridge page is to meet people where
they are at, and then get them to where they need to be
to buy. My first goal is to give them what I promised on the
initial page. My second goal is to “bridge” the gap between
what I just gave them, and what I’m trying to sell them.
For example, on this bridge page I tell them that:
• 	First, the free website I gave them is great, but if they
can’t get people (notice I said
people, not traffic) to
their website, then they can’t actually make any money.
• 	Second, I explain that we call people who are coming to
our website “traffic.”
• 	Third, I say I can show them how to get as much traffic
as they want on the next page.
See how I bridged the gap in those three sentences? Now
when they go to the next page, and see a video talking
about traffic, they have context on
what it is, and
why they
need it.
Context is key – without it, they won’t buy.
I’ve included the script I used for that bridge page video
ClickFunnels Bridge Page Funnel:
Affiliate Bridge Page Funnel:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 13 --

contains material protected under International and Federal Copyright Laws and Treaties. No part of this publication may be transmitted or reproduced in any way without the prior written
permission of the author. Violations of this copyright will be enforced to the full extent of the law.
The information services and resources provided in this book are based upon the current internet marketing environment. The techniques presented have been extraordinarily
lucrative and rewarding. Because the internet is constantly changing, the sites and services presented in this book may change, cease or expand with time. We hope that the skills and
knowledge acquired from this course will provide you with the ability to adapt to inevitable internet evolution. However, we cannot be held responsible for changes that may affect the
applicability of these techniques.
Any earnings, income statements or other results, are based on our own testing and are only estimates of what we think you could earn. There is no assurance you will do as
well as stated in any examples. If you rely upon any figures provided, you must accept the entire risk of not doing as well as the information provided.
Screenshots in this book are from publicly accessible field archives. All product names, logos and artwork are copyrights of their respective owners. None of the owners have
sponsored or endorsed this publication. While all attempts have been made to verify information provided, the author assumes no responsibility for errors, omissions, or contrary
interpretation on the subject matter herein. Any perceived slights of peoples or organizations are unintentional. The purchaser or reader of this publication assumes responsibility for
the use of these materials and information. No guarantees of income are made. The author reserves the right to make changes and assumes no responsibility or liability whatsoever on
behalf of any purchaser or reader of these materials.

All Rights Reserved
along with this issue. We no longer sell this product, but it
should serve as a guide for you on how you can structure
you bridge page videos.
You can see what this “bridge page funnel” looks like as well
as a few other examples of bridge page funnels that we’ve
created in the past on pages six and seven.
ClickFunnels Bridge Page:
On this page we were trying to sell ClickFunnels. We wanted
to go out to cold markets and bring them back in so we
were giving away a dental funnel to dentists. We were
giving away a chiropractor funnel to chiropractors, etc...
It worked okay, but I made the same mistake in this funnel
as I warned you about earlier. Can you catch it?
Yes, I called it a marketing “funnel.” That’s industry jargon
that a dentist or chiropractor wouldn’t understand. In future
tests we will change that from “Marketing Funnel” to “Secret
Website” or something like that.
Affiliate Bridge Page:
On this one, I knew that I wanted to sell my own products to
Robert Kiyosaki’s audience, but I didn’t know how to bridge
his message with mine. So we found a video on YouTube, I
embedded it on the bridge page and then gave it away for free.
(We targeted his fans on Facebook and his videos on YouTube).
We then became affiliates for Robert Kiyosaki’s products,
and sold one of his trainings on step two of this bridge
page. Our goal was to make enough affiliate commissions
to break even on our ad costs.
Then, in the email follow up sequence, we introduced his
audience to our free book offer. So far, this campaign has
almost hit break even on our ad costs. We’re still tweaking
it and trying to figure out the best offer to link to on the
bridge page, but I feel like we’re close. As soon as we’re at
break even we will be able to get an unlimited number of
Kiyosaki fans to join my list for
free!!!
Do you see the power now behind the bridge pages? They
are easy to setup and will give you the ability to
finally
convert cold traffic!
$0cOSt tO geneRate a lead when yOu
hit BReak even pOint cOnveRting cOld
tRaffic with BRidge page funnelS
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 13 --

If you look in your email inbox... You're gonna notice
something kinda strange.
I just sent you an email that will change your life forever.
In that email is a link to where you can get your
free money
making website I promised you.
But this isn't any normal website...
The guy who created this website, used it to become a
millionaire...
And he's going to give you that
exact same website... for
free! Does that sound cool...?
But as you probably know, having a website is just step
#1... Right?
It's kinda like in that movie "field of dreams" where Kevin
Costner's character was told to build a baseball field... and
that: "If you build it.. they will come..." right?
Wrong...
Just because you have a website that
can make you
money... if no one knows where it is...
Then it's gonna make you $0.
Yup... The website I just gave you is powerful, but if you
don't learn how to get traffic (or people) to that website...
Then it's worth zero, zip, zilch.. nada...
nothing!
But... if you do get people (or what we like to call traffic) to
it, then it could
literally be worth
millions to you (just like it
has been to me).
So - the next big question is
how do I get people to show
up to my website...?
Well, you're in luck.
I happen to specialize in that.
And don't worry - I don't do or teach any of the technical,
complicated stuff...
I follow
very simple techniques that are free or mostly
free... that
anyone can do.
Literally - if you can send an email... then you can do this.
So... I want to give you a few things to help you get traffic
fast... First - I just gave you a free subscription to my email
newsletter...
Each day I'm going to email you a few strategies that you
can use to start getting traffic to your new website
fast...
Now, I'm sure you get a lot of emails... no doubt about it.
Some get your attention, but most don't.
For this... I
need your attention! I need you to commit to
me and your new business.
Sample:
Script for bridge
page videoS
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 13 --

You've given me your email address for a reason.
Allow me to give you back 100X that in value (minimum!).
But, in order for me to deliver this massive value for you... I
need you to play your part.
Sound fair?
Every email I send you moving forward will come from
Russell Brunson (that's me...)
And have the subject line prefixed with:
[DCSX] CH 1 - ___________________
When you see that email hit your inbox - open it and read
it asap. Each email will be between 500 and 1200 words
long and will give you the keys you need to maximize your
success. Sound good?
Oh ya.. and
please don't delete *any* of these emails. :)
Check your junk or spam folder if you think you're missing
an email - just in case.
Next... create a special "Russell Brunson" mailbox folder.
Each day when the training email comes in:
1st - read it
2nd - if there is a task for you to do - do it.
3rd - then archive the email in your special folder
Next... For five years I had a $5,000 coaching program.
Over 850 people signed up and paid the full $5k to learn
internet marketing from me.
And from this coaching program, we've had some
amazing results.
But recently I stopped offering this program, for any price.
But today, as a special gift, I wanted to
give you 30 days of
this coaching program for free...
Well, kinda for free...
You're gonna have to pay $1 to prove that you're serious...
But if you are (and I think you are...) then you'll get a video
each day from me for 30 days, coaching you through
how
and
where to get traffic (or people) to come to your website
and give you money!
When you take your new website... and this traffic... you've
got everything you need to become a success!
Does that sound like something you want?
Because I promise you that it's something you need.
A big percentage of the people who take this 30 day
coaching program get their first visitors to their website
within the first seven days...
By day 14 they are actively building their own email list...
And by the end of day 30... most of them have made their
first sale online!
Isn't that exciting?...
So I want to give you more information about the
DotComSecretsX coaching program now...
All you need to do is click on the "Click Here To Continue"
button now to get started.
And while I'm waiting for you to click that button...
I want to show you a few (of the
thousands) of DCSX
students who made
money during their first 30 days...
Click on the "click here to continue" button now, and I'll see
you on the next page.
bridge page video Script, cont.www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

BRYAn Post, Inner CIrCle member
DCS SuCCeSS
Personal Motto
Just hold on man!
HoMetown
Rogers, AR
Main websites
ProjectWellnessNWA.com
AfterBabyAbs.com
age
42
eMail subscribers
Thousands...
incoMe earned since
Joining dcs ignite:
Last year $1.77 Million
bryan’S VISIon boarD
Q: Can you tell us about your business?
A: I’ve been an entrepreneur since I was six years old. My
first stand I made $.85, my second and third less than a dollar
and my fourth $3.75! I was hooked. Moral of the story... just
hold on man! As a kid I sold everything... I even put M&Ms
inside of a pine cone and tried to sell them as decorations.
Three years ago I sold a supplement company for almost
a half million. At the time I knew Russell but it was really
before he launched Supplement Secrets so I wasn’t familiar
with a lot of the traffic strategies I’ve since learned, and quite
frankly I got bored. It was all mostly automated at the time
and a couple of my key contractors decided to quit which
was going to require me to start working in it again. I was
dreading this so my wife suggested that I sell it and come
manage her medical practice. So I did.
In 2012 she ended the year at $250K and my first steps were
to niche the clinic for hormones and weight loss, since she is
a hormone expert. As a doctor if you are seeing sick patients
every day, all day, it’s pretty much a dead end billing insurance.
Therefore, I created a niche around hormones and weight loss
and we started selling cash packages. We did pretty well.
The following year, 2013, we had grown to $750k in revenue,
and then in 2014 we added bigger packages and I got more
creative in our marketing using more dotcom lead gen
techniques and creating mini-funnels and commitments
which drove more traffic. We also did, and still do, a lot of
old school direct response which is my favorite. All of this
combined helped us hit our 2014 number of $1.77 million.
We’ve since merged with another clinic with multiple
locations who had several insurance related medical clinics
but no cash based model. So we are expanding. I’ve also
started another supplement company using Russell’s
Supplement Secrets lessons and we are very excited about a
new program we are launching nationally using the live and
automated webinar model to help women who’ve struggled
with infertility issues.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 11 of 13 --

Join Inner Circle members like Bryan by applying
online at http://ignite.dotcomsecrets.com
Q: What challenges were you facing when
you decided to join DCS Ignite?
A: Probably the biggest was just having a consistent mentor
to keep me on track, provide suggestions, give ideas to test,
etc. And then some of the core guidance like where to find
the best traffic sources, how to scale, etc.
Q: How have Russell and DotComSecrets
helped your business grow?
A: I’ve completely changed my paradigm for possibilities.
Being with Russell and other big thinking, action-taking,
ass-kicking marketers who are passionate, ethical, loving,
and supportive is an amazing experience. Being a part of
the group alone keeps you going when something you are
testing is not working the way you hoped it would.
When you risk it all and you’ve got guys and girls who are
behind you, even from a distance, it has an amazing energizing
effect. And then there’s the education that is gained. Cutting-
edge, ahead of the curve, marketing insights and guidance
that your average person does have access to unless they get
involved in a group like this. I love my mastermind members
and Russell too. He’s changed my life in so many ways.
Q: How has that growth affected your life?
A: It’s helped to remove fear. And that’s the biggest obstacle
facing us all. Russell approaches things with openness and
excitement. He doesn’t put on any airs, he’s just a down to
earth guy sharing what he’s learned and excitedly wanting
everyone else to have that same success. Seeing that
modeled and being a part of it is an amazing gift.
Q: Can you share a favorite accomplishment
you’ve made as a business owner?
A: I’ve been an instrument for love and understanding in
the lives of countless people. Through my efforts and those
of my wife we are helping people feel better, live longer,
laugh more, walk again, breathe better, make more love, and
accomplish their goals. There is no greater feeling in the world
than seeing these things unfold. My wife is the true genius.
I get to experience lives changing based on her passion and
gifts. At the end of the day we are changing lives for the better
and that in turn enhances our lives financially, spiritually, and
emotionally. I’m living the dream baby. I am my own boss.
Financially, I’ve been able to help my family members, my
children, and friends with no strings attached. My daughter
has a medical condition that requires a wheelchair. She was
able to get a new one. I make it possible for her mother
to stay home with her full-time, and I recently helped my
daughter put a new roof on her home. I am very blessed.
Q: What is your top goal for the rest of 2015?
A: To be the best husband and father that I can possibly
be. After that I’ve got five clinics that I plan to have up and
running full steam by the end of the year so that 1,000
women and men who’ve been dependent on dangerous
pharmaceuticals can be drug free and feeling supercharged
and joyous. I want our fertility program to help 1,000 women
accomplish the dream of finally having a baby. What an
amazing feeling that will be! And I have a goal to sell 50,000
bottles of our hormonal timing/fat burning supplements that
will inspire women everywhere to get in those bikinis and
feel sexy again! Women are amazing. They should be made
to feel that way. I’m blessed to have one of the sexiest wives
in the world. I want every man to feel that way. Those are all
BHAGS and half the year is passed so I better get my ass busy!
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
